---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an infrastructure, documentation, or verification improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: krotname
---

## Goal

Describe the operational goal.

## Proposed change

Describe the desired repository, Ansible, PowerShell, Frigate, Ollama, or documentation change.

## Constraints

List hardware, network, security, compatibility, or maintenance constraints.

## Verification

Describe how the change should be validated.
